ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "closed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the university is closed */,
  "unaccredited" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the university is unaccredited */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the university was founded */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of university (e.g., public, private, research) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the university */,
  "president" TEXT /* Name of the current president or chancellor */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff members */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "rank_order" INTEGER /* Rank order of the university */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the ranking */,
  "scores_overall" REAL /* Overall score of the university */,
  "scores_overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall rank of the university */,
  "scores_teaching" REAL /* Teaching score of the university */,
  "scores_teaching_rank" INTEGER /* Teaching rank of the university */,
  "scores_research" REAL /* Research score of the university */,
  "scores_research_rank" INTEGER /* Research rank of the university */,
  "scores_citations" REAL /* Citations score of the university */,
  "scores_citations_rank" INTEGER /* Citations rank of the university */,
  "scores_industry_income" REAL /* Industry income score of the university */,
  "scores_industry_income_rank" INTEGER /* Industry income rank of the university */,
  "scores_international_outlook" REAL /* International outlook score of the university */,
  "scores_international_outlook_rank" INTEGER /* International outlook rank of the university */,
  "rank_type" TEXT /* Type of ranking (e.g., global, regional, subject-specific) */,
  "rank_source" TEXT /* Source of the ranking (e.g., Times Higher Education, QS World University Rankings) */,
  "rank_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used for ranking */,
  "rank_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the ranking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stats" (
  "stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stats entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "number_students" TEXT /* Number of students */,
  "student_staff_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-staff ratio */,
  "pc_intl_students" TEXT /* Percentage of international students */,
  "female_male_ratio" TEXT /* Female-to-male ratio */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the statistics */,
  "total_male_students" INTEGER /* Total number of male students */,
  "total_female_students" INTEGER /* Total number of female students */,
  "total_intl_students" INTEGER /* Total number of international students */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff members */,
  "total_faculty" INTEGER /* Total number of faculty members */,
  "average_age_students" REAL /* Average age of students */,
  "average_age_faculty" REAL /* Average age of faculty members */,
  "percentage_graduates_employed" REAL /* Percentage of graduates employed within a year of graduation */,
  "percentage_intl_faculty" REAL /* Percentage of international faculty members */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stats_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Alternative name or alias for the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aliases_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "subject_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "subject_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the subject */,
  "subject_level" TEXT /* Level of the subject (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "university_subjects" (
  "university_subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university-subject mapping */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_subjects_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_university_subjects_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, student) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the subject category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subject_category_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject-category mapping */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_category_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES subject_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subject_category_mapping_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the ranking data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)
